selected_title: Іnternational Experience Of Transformation Of The Relations Of Central And Local Authorities In The Process Of Decentralization And Its Impact On The Efficiency Of Public Administration
question: What mechanism does E S Belousova identify in “Іnternational Experience Of Transformation Of The Relations Of Central And Local Authorities In The Process Of Decentralization And Its Impact On The Efficiency Of Public Administration” that deepens the evidence from “Analysis on Two Thoughts on the Central and Local Decentralization Before and After the 8th CPC National Congress”?

evidence_spans.text: The article is devoted to research of international experience of transformation of the relations of Central and local authorities in the decentralization process, analysis of the impact of decentralization on the efficiency of public administration. The experience of Britain, which was at the forefront of public administration reforms, Germany, France and the Scandinavian countries, allows us to see how different background, content and results of decentralization, which, in our opinion, is already inevitable and necessary in reforming the system of state management of Ukraine.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Decentralization, Administration (probate law) through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 84 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
